commitResults.messageTitle: Punto 1.15- Preguntas 1,2 y 3 + Uso de IA en este caso
commitResults.messageBody:
Added arguments and counterarguments regarding the influence of personal characteristics on heart diseases, including logical, ethical, and emotional perspectives. Also documented the use of AI in formulating these arguments.

↑ Esto lo puso copilot
